title: demkit
body:
## By DEMORA
Plugin 1.21 for convenient sets. Allows you to manually transfer the necessary resources to the set in the interactive menu, which makes a unique mechanic.

```/demkit create name - create a set
/demkit give player_nickname name - gives the specified set to the specified player
/demkit giveall name - gives the specified set to all players
/demkit delete name - deletes the specified set
/demkit reload - reloads the plugin```
